→ 扑频 [3, 5] Hz, 体重 [200, 400] g" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="420" x="100" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2E5;strokeColor=#587A4A;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="② search_organism(name="隼")
→ 扑频 [4, 6] Hz, 体重 [500, 900] g" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="420" x="100" y="305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_t3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2E5;strokeColor=#587A4A;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="（可选）③ query_mimics_path(dominant_type="morphology")
按形态相似度找以鸽子为原型的样机（兑现 4 类相似度通道）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="420" x="100" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EFF5;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=6;" value="<b>LLM 综合输出：</b>

• 鸽子扑频 3–5 Hz，隼扑频 4–6 Hz
• 差异源自体重不同（鸽子 ≈ 0.5×隼）
• 对比表 + 文献溯源（HAS_REFERENCE）
• 无需物理工具调用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="420" x="100" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_metric" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#3A6B8A;fontStyle=2;" value="📊 评测指标：Hit@k, EM, F1, RAGAS Faithfulness（5.2.1 节）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="420" x="100" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_q" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>输入查询：</b>
"重量 30 g、续航 15 min、需悬停的微型扑翼机推荐"" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="420" x="680" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="recall_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#7E57C2;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=4;" value="<b>粗筛阶段（创新 3）</b>
tensor_recall(weight=30, endurance=900s, can_hover=True)
→ Top-10 候选（毫秒级）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="420" x="680" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rerank_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#B85450;" value="精排阶段（创新 2）：对每个候选依次执行 →" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="420" x="680" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_t1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE8E2;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="① hassanalian_weight(15min, 0g 载重)
→ 复核物理可行重量 ≈ 28 g，与候选 25–35 g 匹配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="420" x="680" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE8E2;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="② shyy_scaling_law(weight=30g)
→ 翼展预测 280 mm，扑频 18 Hz；与候选偏离度量化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="420" x="680" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_t3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE8E2;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="③ query_mimics_path(候选, dominant_type)
→ 检查仿生主导维度是否与「悬停 + 微型」任务匹配" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="420" x="680" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EFF5;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;verticalAlign=middle;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=6;" value="<b>LLM 综合输出：</b> Top-3 推荐

1. Nano Hummingbird (排名 1, 物理校验全通过)
2. RoboBee X-Wing (排名 2, 续航偏短)
3. KUBeetle-S (排名 3, 重量略高)
附：JSON 物理校验报告 + 推理路径 P" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="420" x="680" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_metric" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#B85450;fontStyle=2;" value="📊 评测指标：NDCG@5, MRR, 物理校验通过率（5.2.2 节）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="420" x="680" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 570px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1F2A36;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1F2A36, #c2cbd5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: BioBridge-GraphRAG 两类应用模式对比

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(244, 248, 251), rgb(22, 25, 28)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(58, 107, 138), rgb(117, 159, 186));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 280px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #3A6B8A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3A6B8A, #759fba); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 模式 A：知识查询模式

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 118px; margin-left: 280px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5C7894;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#5C7894, #758da5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 单点 / 对比型问题 · D ≤ 3 · 工具调用 0–3 次

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 245, 238), rgb(29, 25, 19)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 95px; margin-left: 860px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #B85450;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#B85450, #d7817e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 模式 B：推荐精排模式

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 118px; margin-left: 860px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #9C5048;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#9C5048, #ce8d86); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 方案设计型问题 · D ≈ 4–6 · 与张量分解粗筛协同（粗筛—精排两阶段）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 178px; margin-left: 71px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
输入查询：
"鸽子和隼的扑频差异在哪？"

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(234, 242, 229), rgb(27, 34, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(88, 122, 74), rgb(121, 150, 108));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 408px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div:
① search_organism(name="鸽子")
→ 扑频 [3, 5] Hz, 体重 [200, 400] g

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(234, 242, 229), rgb(27, 34, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(88, 122, 74), rgb(121, 150, 108));

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② search_organism(name="隼")
→ 扑频 [4, 6] Hz, 体重 [500, 900] g

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(234, 242, 229), rgb(27, 34, 23)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(88, 122, 74), rgb(121, 150, 108));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 408px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
（可选）③ query_mimics_path(dominant_type="morphology")
按形态相似度找以鸽子为原型的样机（兑现 4 类相似度通道）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 239, 245), rgb(28, 34, 40)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(58, 107, 138), rgb(117, 159, 186));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 406px; height: 1px; padding-top: 503px; margin-left: 84px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
LLM 综合输出：
• 鸽子扑频 3–5 Hz，隼扑频 4–6 Hz
• 差异源自体重不同（鸽子 ≈ 0.5×隼）
• 对比表 + 文献溯源（HAS_REFERENCE）
• 无需物理工具调用

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 600px; margin-left: 280px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #3A6B8A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3A6B8A, #759fba); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 📊 评测指标：Hit@k, EM, F1, RAGAS Faithfulness（5.2.1 节）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.div:
输入查询：
"重量 30 g、续航 15 min、需悬停的微型扑翼机推荐"

div.div:
粗筛阶段（创新 3）
tensor_recall(weight=30, endurance=900s, can_hover=True)
→ Top-10 候选（毫秒级）

① hassanalian_weight(15min, 0g 载重)
→ 复核物理可行重量 ≈ 28 g，与候选 25–35 g 匹配

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(252, 232, 226), rgb(49, 31, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 408px; height: 1px; padding-top: 404px; margin-left: 662px;

div.div:
② shyy_scaling_law(weight=30g)
→ 翼展预测 280 mm，扑频 18 Hz；与候选偏离度量化

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(252, 232, 226), rgb(49, 31, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 408px; height: 1px; padding-top: 459px; margin-left: 662px;

div.div:
③ query_mimics_path(候选, dominant_type)
→ 检查仿生主导维度是否与「悬停 + 微型」任务匹配

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 239, 245), rgb(28, 34, 40)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(58, 107, 138), rgb(117, 159, 186));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 406px; height: 1px; padding-top: 553px; margin-left: 664px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
LLM 综合输出： Top-3 推荐
1. Nano Hummingbird (排名 1, 物理校验全通过)
2. RoboBee X-Wing (排名 2, 续航偏短)
3. KUBeetle-S (排名 3, 重量略高)
